note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 2.4x4.5x0.1cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 33% gran, 67% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Morales notified.

Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 1.4x2.7, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
